formulas.name: 1. Determinant of a 2x2 Matrix
formulas.notes: Used to find the determinant of a 2x2 matrix

formulas.name: 2. Determinant of a 3x3 Matrix
formulas.formula: a(ei - fh) - b(di - fg) + c(dh - eg)
formulas.variables: a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i
formulas.notes: Used to find the determinant of a 3x3 matrix

formulas.name: 3. Expansion of Determinant along a Row or Column
formulas.formula: det(A) = a11C11 + a12C12 + ... + a1nC1n (for expansion along a row)
formulas.notes: Used to expand the determinant of a matrix along a row or column

formulas.name: 4. Properties of Determinants
formulas.notes: Used to find the determinant of a matrix under certain operations (transposition, scalar multiplication)

formulas.name: 5. Cofactor of an Element
formulas.notes: Used to find the cofactor of an element in a matrix

formulas.name: 6. Adjoint of a Matrix
formulas.notes: Used to find the adjoint of a matrix

formulas.name: 7. Inverse of a Matrix using Determinant and Adjoint
formulas.notes: Used to find the inverse of a matrix

formulas.name: 8. Determinant of a product of Matrices
formulas.notes: Used to find the determinant of a product of two matrices

formulas.name: 9. Determinant of a Matrix with Zero Rows or Columns
formulas.formula: det(A) = 0 if A has a zero row or column
formulas.notes: Used to find the determinant of a matrix with a zero row or column

formulas.name: 10. Determinant of a Matrix with Identical Rows or Columns
formulas.formula: det(A) = 0 if A has identical rows or columns
formulas.notes: Used to find the determinant of a matrix with identical rows or columns
